testcase.name: Get-AttackChains.Basic functionality.Returns null when config file does not exist
Get-AttackChains.Basic functionality.Returns valid output structure with real config
Get-AttackChains.Basic functionality.Analyzes all defined attack chains
Get-AttackChains.Chain enablement logic.Enables chain when critical controls fail
Get-AttackChains.Chain enablement logic.Reports no chains enabled when all controls pass
Get-AttackChains.Chain enablement logic.Includes chain severity in enabled chains
Get-AttackChains.Chain enablement logic.Sorts chains by severity then enablement score
Get-AttackChains.Chain properties.Each enabled chain has required properties
Get-AttackChains.Chain properties.Chain IDs follow expected format
Get-AttackChains.Chain properties.MITRE techniques follow T-number format
Get-AttackChains.Executive summary generation.Generates executive summary with risk level
Get-AttackChains.Executive summary generation.Risk level is valid enum value
Get-AttackChains.Remediation priorities.Generates remediation priorities list
Get-AttackChains.Remediation priorities.Remediation priorities are sorted by chain impact
Get-AttackChains.MITRE ATT&CK matrix.Builds MITRE matrix view
Get-AttackChains.MITRE ATT&CK matrix.MITRE matrix contains tactics
Get-AttackChains.CIS compliance integration.Accepts CIS compliance object
Get-AttackChains.CIS compliance integration.Uses CIS status to determine chain enablement
Get-AttackChains.Edge cases.Handles empty assessment results
Get-AttackChains.Edge cases.Handles null CIS compliance gracefully
Get-AttackChains.Edge cases.Handles assessment results with Info status
Get-AttackChains.Chain counts.Reports correct critical chain count
Get-AttackChains.Chain counts.Reports correct high chain count
Format-AttackChainConsole.Does not throw with valid attack chain data
Format-AttackChainConsole.Handles null input gracefully
Get-HistoryStorePath.Path resolution.Returns default path when no BasePath specified
Get-HistoryStorePath.Path resolution.Uses custom BasePath when specified
Get-AssessmentHistory.File operations.Returns empty history when file does not exist
Get-AssessmentHistory.File operations.Loads history from existing file
Get-AssessmentHistory.File operations.Returns version information
Get-AssessmentHistory.Filtering.Filters by TenantId
Get-AssessmentHistory.Filtering.Filters by DaysBack
Get-AssessmentHistory.Filtering.Combines TenantId and DaysBack filters
Get-AssessmentHistory.Filtering.Sorts entries by timestamp descending
Get-AssessmentHistory.Error handling.Handles corrupted JSON gracefully
Save-AssessmentToHistory.Basic save operations.Creates new history file when none exists
Save-AssessmentToHistory.Basic save operations.Appends to existing history
Save-AssessmentToHistory.Basic save operations.Returns entry ID on successful save
Save-AssessmentToHistory.Metrics capture.Captures security score when provided
Save-AssessmentToHistory.History pruning.Maintains maximum history entries
Get-SecurityTrends.Insufficient data handling.Returns InsufficientData status with 0 entries
Get-SecurityTrends.Insufficient data handling.Returns InsufficientData status with 1 entry
Get-SecurityTrends.Trend calculation.Calculates improving trend when scores increase
Get-SecurityTrends.Trend calculation.Calculates correct score delta
Get-SecurityTrends.Trend calculation.Calculates total improvement from first assessment
Get-SecurityTrends.Trend calculation.Reports correct data point count
Get-SecurityTrends.Trend calculation.Includes current score and grade
Get-SecurityTrends.Declining trend detection.Detects declining trend when scores decrease
Get-SecurityTrends.Stable trend detection.Detects stable trend when scores are unchanged
Get-RegressionAlerts.Regression detection.Detects critical regressions
Get-RegressionAlerts.Regression detection.Includes regression details
Get-RegressionAlerts.No regression scenarios.Reports no regressions when scores improve
Get-CategoryTrends.Category analysis.Returns trend for each category
Get-CategoryTrends.Category analysis.Calculates correct deltas per category
Get-CategoryTrends.Category analysis.Includes trend icons
Get-TrendVelocity.Velocity calculation.Calculates weekly improvement rate
Get-TrendVelocity.Velocity calculation.Estimates days to target score
Get-TrendVelocity.Velocity calculation.Returns null days when target already achieved
Get-TrendTimeline.Timeline generation.Generates timeline with score data points
Get-TrendTimeline.Timeline generation.Includes labels for chart rendering
Format-TrendConsole.Console output formatting.Does not throw with valid trend data
Format-TrendConsole.Console output formatting.Outputs header with ASCII box
Format-TrendConsole.Console output formatting.Shows insufficient data message when applicable
Format-TrendConsole.Console output formatting.Shows regression warnings when present
Get-TenantSecurityScore.Grade boundaries.Returns grade A for score >= 90
Get-TenantSecurityScore.Grade boundaries.Returns grade F when all checks fail with Critical severity
Get-TenantSecurityScore.Output shape.Returns all required score properties
Get-TenantSecurityScore.Output shape.Summary counts match input results
Get-TenantSecurityScore.Category mapping.Maps checks to correct categories
Get-TenantSecurityScore.Priority identification.Identifies failed checks as top priorities
Get-TenantSecurityScore.Priority identification.Identifies warnings with medium/low severity as quick wins
Get-TenantSecurityScore.Info status handling.Treats Info status as neutral (does not penalize score)
Get-TenantSecurityScore.Info status handling.Does not let Info status inflate score when failures exist
Get-TenantSecurityScore.Status-based scoring (no severity adjustment).Failed critical checks earn 0 points (not 25%)
Get-TenantSecurityScore.Status-based scoring (no severity adjustment).Warning checks earn exactly 50% of weight
Get-TenantSecurityScore.Status-based scoring (no severity adjustment).Mixed 50% fail / 50% pass results in ~50% score
Get-TenantSecurityScore.Status-based scoring (no severity adjustment).Severity does NOT inflate failed check scores
Get-TenantSecurityScore.Status-based scoring (no severity adjustment).All-fail tenant scores 0-10% (not 25-75%)
Get-TenantSecurityScore.Configuration externalization - weights.Uses custom weights from config over defaults
Get-TenantSecurityScore.Configuration externalization - weights.Falls back to defaults when config is null
Get-TenantSecurityScore.Configuration externalization - status scores.Uses custom status scores from config
Get-TenantSecurityScore.Configuration externalization - status scores.Falls back to default status scores when missing from config
Get-TenantSecurityScore.Configuration externalization - category mapping.Uses custom check-to-category mappings from config
Get-TenantSecurityScore.Configuration externalization - category mapping.Falls back to default category mapping when missing
Validate-AssessmentResult.Valid assessment results.Accepts a completely valid result
Validate-AssessmentResult.Valid assessment results.Accepts all valid Status values
Validate-AssessmentResult.Valid assessment results.Accepts all valid Severity values
Validate-AssessmentResult.Valid assessment results.Accepts all valid Category values
Validate-AssessmentResult.Valid assessment results.Accepts empty RemediationSteps array
Validate-AssessmentResult.Invalid result violations.Rejects result missing CheckName property
Validate-AssessmentResult.Invalid result violations.Rejects result with null CheckName
Validate-AssessmentResult.Invalid result violations.Rejects result with empty CheckName
Validate-AssessmentResult.Invalid result violations.Rejects invalid Status value
Validate-AssessmentResult.Invalid result violations.Rejects invalid Severity value
Validate-AssessmentResult.Invalid result violations.Rejects invalid Category value
Validate-AssessmentResult.Invalid result violations.Rejects result with null Message
Validate-AssessmentResult.Invalid result violations.Rejects result with null Recommendation
Validate-AssessmentResult.Invalid result violations.Rejects result with null DocumentationUrl
Validate-AssessmentResult.Invalid result violations.Rejects result with null Details
Validate-AssessmentResult.Invalid result violations.Rejects result with non-array RemediationSteps
Validate-AssessmentResult.Strict mode.Throws on schema violation in strict mode
Validate-AssessmentResult.Strict mode.Returns false on violation in non-strict mode
Validate-AssessmentResult.Assert-AssessmentResult pipeline.Passes valid result through pipeline
Validate-AssessmentResult.Assert-AssessmentResult pipeline.Throws on invalid result in pipeline
Validate-AssessmentResult.Schema contract documentation.Returns schema documentation string
Test-MFAConfiguration.Result contract.Returns an object with all required properties
Test-MFAConfiguration.Status logic at threshold boundaries.Returns Pass when MFA adoption >= threshold (95%)
Test-MFAConfiguration.Status logic at threshold boundaries.Returns Warning when MFA adoption is 75-94%
Test-MFAConfiguration.Status logic at threshold boundaries.Returns Fail when MFA adoption < 75%
Test-MFAConfiguration.Severity logic.Returns Critical severity when MFA adoption < 50%
Test-MFAConfiguration.Severity logic.Returns Low severity when MFA adoption >= 90%
Test-MFAConfiguration.UsersWithoutMFA detail property.Populates UsersWithoutMFA with correct user objects
Test-MFAConfiguration.Edge cases.Returns Info status when no enabled users exist
Test-MFAConfiguration.Edge cases.Returns Info status on Graph API error (never throws)
Test-MFAConfiguration.Edge cases.Uses default threshold when Config is null
Test-MFAConfiguration.Edge cases.Respects custom threshold from Config
Test-MFAConfiguration.Enforcement-aware posture.Downgrades Pass to Warning when all-user CA MFA policy is missing
Test-MFAConfiguration.Enforcement-aware posture.Returns Pass when registration threshold is met and CA MFA covers all users and admins
